<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.8 -->

# src/ai/telemetry

Telemetry subsystem for capturing AI service usage metrics per CLI run: accumulates token counts, latencies, and file reads in memory via `TelemetryLogger`, writes final `RunLog` to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/run-*.json`, and prunes old logs.

## Contents

**[cleanup.ts](./cleanup.ts)** — `cleanupOldLogs(projectRoot, keepCount)` deletes all but N most recent `run-*.json` files sorted by ISO timestamp filename; returns deletion count.

**[logger.ts](./logger.ts)** — `TelemetryLogger` class: accumulates `TelemetryEntry[]` in memory per run, exposes `addEntry`, `setFilesReadOnLastEntry`, `getSummary` (computes aggregate inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheReadTokens, cacheCreationTokens, calls, durationMs, errorCount, filesRead, uniqueFilesRead), `toRunLog` (finalizes with endTime).

**[run-log.ts](./run-log.ts)** — `writeRunLog(projectRoot, runLog)` serializes `RunLog` to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/run-{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.json` with 2-space indent; creates logs dir if missing.

## Data Flow

1. CLI command instantiates `TelemetryLogger(runId, backend, model, command)` at start
2. AI service calls append `TelemetryEntry` via `addEntry()`
3. File reads attached to last entry via `setFilesReadOnLastEntry()`
4. At run completion, CLI calls `toRunLog()` to freeze state with computed summary
5. `writeRunLog()` persists `RunLog` to disk with sanitized filename
6. Periodic `cleanupOldLogs(projectRoot, keepCount)` enforces retention policy

## Behavioral Contracts

### Filename Pattern
`run-{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.json` where `:` and `.` in segments become `-` (e.g., `run-generate-claude-sonnet-2026-02-07T12-00-00-000Z.json`).

### Logs Directory
`LOGS_DIR = '.agents-reverse-engineer/logs'` — shared constant in `cleanup.ts` and `run-log.ts`.

### Timestamp Ordering
Cleanup relies on lexicographic sort of `run-*.json` filenames for chronological ordering (ISO 8601 timestamps sort correctly as strings).

## Dependencies

Imports `TelemetryEntry`, `RunLog`, `FileRead` from `../types.js` — telemetry data shapes defined in parent module.
